name: Pineapple Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Split, skin and bone the chicken breasts.
2. Drain the pineapple and remove any sweetened bits.
3. Place the chicken in the crockpot.
4. Sprinkle pepper and paprika over the chicken.
5. Mix the pineapple and mustard together.
6. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
7. Cover and cook on LOW for 7 to 9 hours, or HIGH for 3 to 4 hours.
8. Serves 6
